description: Conservative broker-paper canary scope and limits. Read by shared/broker_paper_canary_unlock.py + shared/broker_paper_canary_preflight.py. NEVER modified at runtime by any LLM agent.
v3_29_note: v3.29 shipped the unlock evaluator only.
v3_30_note: v3.30 ships the pre-executor (shared/broker_paper_canary_preflight.py) in preflight-only mode. canary_execution_flag_present is now true so the unlock evaluator can advance past 'NO_SAFE_ENABLE_SWITCH' — but canary_order_placement_implemented stays false: NO order is placed in v3.30. A future audited PR that introduces the actual safe canary executor flips canary_order_placement_implemented to true.
